message:
fix(history): always serialize commits and cycle_time fields as null

Go legacy bv always includes commits and cycle_time in the per-bead
history output (as null when no git data). Rust was using
skip_serializing_if which omitted them entirely. Remove the skip
attribute so the JSON shape matches Go output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -50,9 +50,7 @@ pub struct HistoryBeadCompat {
     pub status: String,
     pub events: Vec<HistoryEventCompat>,
     pub milestones: HistoryMilestonesCompat,
-    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
     pub commits: Option<Vec<HistoryCommitCompat>>,
-    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
     pub cycle_time: Option<HistoryCycleCompat>,
     pub last_author: String,
 }
